feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to create delta keyfigure in a SAC story table
entry.content:
hi,

i would like to calcualte the delta for different keyfigures.

All the different keyfigures are in the rows (1)

in columns

Current Period, Previous period,

Delta (To calculate) (3)

What to do in SAC that i can create the delta column as on the screenshot ?

entry.title: How to add a calculated column in SAC story without scripting
entry.content:
hi,

how i can generate this calculated column in a sac story table object without scripting?

different measures are in the rows

entry.title: Loading Master and Transactional Data from Datasphere into SAC - Seamless Planing
entry.content:
Hi,

i have created a planning model in SAC, which is also stored and managed in SAP Datasphere.

To load master data and transactional data from Datasphere views into my model, the only method I have found so far is to create OData service connections.

Since I’m working with multiple dimensions, this approach results in a large number of individual connections being visible in SAC, which significantly reduces clarity and usability.

My questions:

  1. Is this currently the only way to integrate master and transactional data from Datasphere views into a SAC planning model that is also stored in Datasphere?

  2. In the context of Seamless Planning, would this OData-based approach be considered appropriate – or are there best practices that suggest otherwise?

Thank you in advance for your support and feedback.

entry.title: The results of the data action "XXXXXXX" could not be published on version "yyyy".
entry.content:
Hello, 

One user getting below error message when publish the data action from story. The data action is having 3 steps which copy data from different model.

All steps are running fine, but when publish step comes then it shows below error

The results of the data action "XXXXXXX" could not be published on version "yyyy". You don't have the resources available to publish this version. Please try again later." 

The strange part is that, when I run the data action I am able to do it without any issue. I am the owner of that model.

There is a KBA from SAP, but I am not getting as what to change here because I am able to run the data action without any issue.

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003618840

Thanks.

entry.title: BASEMEMBER as IF input
entry.content:
I'd like to implement this logic dynamically, taking the attribute from another dimension. If a BASEMEMBER could be used as an input for an IF statement, it would be as follows; however, this isn't possible:

IF [d/CECO] = BASEMEMBER([d/CECO], [d/CICLO].[p/Receiver_CC]) THEN
ENDIF

Do you know of any way to do this?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Is it possible to access tooltip information of a chart using javascript in SAC?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'd like to know if there is a way to access measure values that are part of the tooltip in a chart. So far, I can't find a method to do it. 

Thank you

entry.title: Couldn't import object. Parent resource does not exist- Importing an object to SAC Production Tenant
entry.content:
Hello Everyone - When we are trying to import a package to SAC Production tenant, it is giving an error message, "Couldn't import object <Object Name>. Parent resource does not exist.

I added the model, which I used to create a model. I ensured not to select dependent object as I don't want to impact any other objects in production tenant. But after the package is generated, I see a few dependent dimensions as well as data locking configuration. I compared the data locking between production and quality tenants. It seems a little different. Hence I don't want to take the risk. 

I tried importing the model and it's dimensions excluding the locking. It still fails with the same message.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Language Display Requirement in SAC Reports
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement where some users want the headers (like field names) to be shown in English, but the data content (like descriptions) to be shown in Japanese in the SAC reports.

There are also users who prefer to see both headers and data in Japanese.

Not sure if SAP provides any standard language pack or option to support this kind of setup in SAC.

Please let us know if we have anu suggestions.

Thanks!

entry.title: SAC Transport - to overwrite objects, but not data
entry.content:
Hello,

I am transporting a solution using Content Network Storage.

For the first time, I need to transport everything from Prod to Dev. I chose "Overwrite objects and data", everything were transported except transactional data in models. Why data in models are not transported?

Later, I will need to transport new enhancements from Dev to Prod. In this case objects should be transported and overwritten, but not data. Surprisingly, SAC does not offer such option "Overwrite objects only" (not data). It means not only data in models, but also data in dimensions should not be overwritten too. What options do you choose for transporting from Dev to Prod?

Looking forward to hearing from you,
Oleksandr

entry.title: Review Task in calendar is not changing state from Open to In Progress
entry.content:
Hi team,

I have created a review task in calendar and have applied the dependency of a general task completion. Once the general task is completed , the mail to triggered to Reviewer with the story link. When the reviewer is opening the story, he is not able to see submit/decline button. The status of task remains "Open" and does not change to In progress.

Any idea why is this behavior.

Thanks,

Jain

entry.title: Request: Where-Used List for HANA Views & BEx Queries in SAC Models/Stories
entry.content: How can I generate a comprehensive Where-Used list of HANA views and BEx queries that are being utilized in existing SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) models and stories, to ensure impact analysis before making changes to the underlying data sources?

entry.title: Not getting calendar email notification
entry.content:
One of our team member is not getting SAC calendar notifications.

We have checked the profile settings in SAC settings and the system notifications and calendar notifications checkbox is enabled there.

Checked the Junk/Spam folder in Outlook. No trace of any mail.

What could be the issue

Thanks.

entry.title: .getDataSource().getInfo().sourceLastRefreshedAt doesnt show correct last datetime
entry.content:
Hi,

as mentioned in Developer Handbook this code doesnt work correctly. It always gives previous day 22:00. Also in Handbook 🙂

var dsInfo = Chart_1.getDataSource().getInfo();
if (dsInfo.sourceLastRefreshedAt !== undefined) {

strLastRefresh = dsInfo.sourceLastRefreshedAt.toISOString();
}
console.log("Source last refreshed at: " + strLastRefresh);

Any ideas?
BR

Alex

entry.title: Calculated Totals in table & filter based dynamic calculations
entry.content:
Hello community,

I have a requirement where i need to show calculated values under a column as a total. Please refer the IMAGE, my calculations are like this: -

1. I get opening column data for each flock and age, i will need only my first age opening column value in each flock, then i will sum it up to get a value A.

2.Now i have a diff column for each age, i need to multiply the diff column value with my opening to get Cal1 values which i will sum to get B.

3.Now i will do A/B to get my data

     but here is my requirement, the diff i will multiply with the opening should change with my age filter, which means the diff column data will be based on what age i choose and accordingly it will get the values multiply and divide to show me the value in total.

Please tell me any workaround

entry.title: Exploring Seamless Planning via Free Trial SAP BDC
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to explore seamless planning via Free Trial version of SAP BDC.

1- When I try creating a planning model within SAC system provided as part of BDC Free Trial, the option is not available  ( grayed out) . I can only create an analytical model. See below

 

Is it because the free trial user has only BI license but not planning? I can't confirm this either as I don't have access to "users" section within SAC but looking at the tasks I can do in this sytem, it suggests it is a BI license.

2- I also want to try importing data from SAC DSP into SAC via OData ( that's the only option to consume actuals for planning purpose from DSP) but there seems no ODATa connection by default. I would create myself but I can't see OAuth Client ID etc in corresponding BDC DSP system either becuase the step 3 described in below screenshot is not accessible by free trial user in DSP system 

Just want to ensure if I am not missing anything .Security wise these steps might be demanding and not possible but it would be great to be able to explore seamless planning and data acquisition from DSP to SAC  via free trial versions as well. Is there a workaround ?

entry.title: Create Import(Acquire) Connection at SAC with source system SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I want to Create Import(Acquire) Connection at SAC with source system SAP HANA Cloud. 

How can I achieve ?

Regards

entry.title: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Available
entry.content:
Hi There

I am trying to open "Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud" Learning Journey, but It is not available

It is available in the Search Results, but there is no link to open the Learning Journey

Attached document contains the error details

entry.title: Issue Importing Customer Master Data with Multiple Combinations of Sales Area in SAC Model
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently working on a dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) where I'm importing Customer Master Data from an SAP S/4HANA data source via a query.

Each customer  in the source system is mapped with multiple combinations of:

  • Sales Organization 

  • Distribution Channel 

  • Division 

This means the same Customer ID appears multiple times across different sales areas. However, while importing this data into SAC, I'm facing a validation issue during the import step — duplicate keys are not allowed because SAC expects a unique ID per master data row.

I'm attaching the screenshot as well explaining the problem.

 

What I Need Help With:

  • How can I structure the dimension so I can import all combinations of Customer + Sales Org + Dist. Channel + Division without violating SAC's unique key constraint?

entry.title: SAC Geo Maps with postal codes
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

I need your help creating a Geo Map in the SAC. I have an excel file, which is to be uploaded (example data, so I can show it to you) and it looks the following:

We have the ags (Amtlicher Gemeindeschlüssel), city, postal code (different districts within the city can have different postal codes), county and the federal state. I also added the longitude and latitude, but initially we wanted to use the areas and not the coordinates.

How can I configure the SAC model in a way, that I can investigate the # of cases in regard to the areas? I want to be able to drill down from the federal state all the way to the postal code. But I wasn't able to configure it that way, as I couldn't find a dimensions type like "postal code", only country, region and subregion or longitutde and latitude.  

I'm thankful for any help you can offer, thanks a lot! If you need more information to answer my request, just let me know.

Best regards,
Jan-Nicolas

entry.title: Report on calendar tasks
entry.content:
Hi,

There is a requirement to show the calendar tasks, assignees , viewers , start date, end date,current status and the information needs to be exported to excel.

Is there a way to export the calendar tasks information to excel.

Thanks,
